name: Cao Huan (Jingming)

sections.short-biography: The last emperor of Wei, he had no power and abdicated to Sima Yan after a short reign.
sections.details:
Traditional Chinese 
	曹奐 (景明)


	 Simplified Chinese

	 Pronunciation 
	Cao2 Huan4 (Jing3ming2)


	 Pinyin (Tones) 
	Cáo Huàn (Jǐngmíng)


	 Wade-Giles 
	Ts‘ao Huan (Ching-ming)

	 Other Names 
	Cao Huang

	 Name Notes 
	Originally named Cao Huang (曹璜). An Emperor’s given name was ineffable. As such, it was stricken from use (sometimes changing city names and re-writing literature). Cao Huang changed his name to Huan to lessen the impact of this practice (learn more).

full_text:
Cao Huan (Jingming) 曹奐 (景明)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cao Huan (曹奐), styledJingming (景明). The last emperor of Wei, he had no power and abdicated to Sima Yan after a short reign. Cao Huan was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Cao Huan lived during the Three Kingdoms and Jin Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
